name: AI_SOC_Block_Ticket
author: SOC-AI-Analyst
description: One-click IP block workflow: files a Jira ticket for the block request. Anomali ThreatStream submission is a documented stub pending a verified API reference — see README before enabling it.

configurationItems.name: jira_url
configurationItems.description: Base URL of your Jira instance, e.g. https://yourorg.atlassian.net

configurationItems.name: jira_api_version
configurationItems.description: "2" (Server/DC, or older Cloud) or "3" (Cloud — uses Atlassian Document Format for description)

configurationItems.name: jira_auth_type
configurationItems.description: "basic" (email + API token, typical for Jira Cloud) or "bearer" (personal access token, typical for Server/DC)

configurationItems.name: jira_username
configurationItems.description: Required if jira_auth_type is "basic" — usually your Jira account email

configurationItems.name: jira_api_token
configurationItems.description: API token (basic auth) or personal access token (bearer auth)

configurationItems.name: jira_project_key
configurationItems.description: Jira project key to create the ticket in, e.g. SOC

configurationItems.name: jira_issue_type
configurationItems.description: Issue type name, e.g. Task, Incident

configurationItems.name: jira_custom_fields_json
configurationItems.description: Optional JSON object mapping Jira custom field IDs to values. Supports {ip} and {case_id} placeholders, e.g. {"customfield_10050": "{ip}"}

configurationItems.name: anomali_enabled
configurationItems.description: Leave false until the Anomali ThreatStream API call has been verified against your tenant — see README. When false, the responder still files the Jira ticket and reports anomali_status: not_implemented.

configurationItems.name: anomali_api_url
configurationItems.description: Not used yet — reserved for when the Anomali integration is implemented

configurationItems.name: anomali_username
configurationItems.description: Not used yet — reserved for when the Anomali integration is implemented

configurationItems.name: anomali_api_key
configurationItems.description: Not used yet — reserved for when the Anomali integration is implemented

configurationItems.name: anomali_list_id
configurationItems.description: Not used yet — reserved for when the Anomali integration is implemented
